name: Mocha Fudge
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Dark chocolate, broken into pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease and line a lamington pan with foil.
2. Place chocolate, sweetened condensed milk, and butter in a saucepan.
3. Stir constantly over low heat until the mixture is smooth.
4. Blend instant coffee and boiling water together until the coffee is dissolved.
5. Add the blended coffee to the chocolate mixture and stir until evenly combined.
6. Pour into the prepared pan and refrigerate until set.
7. Cut into squares to serve.
8. Cover with plastic wrap and refrigerate until ready to use.
